LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GUADALUPE LOPEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT SEEKING RELIEF AS TO MS. LOPEZ OR HER UNIT IN THIS ACTION. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS G M A C MORTGAGE, LLC FKA GMAC MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFENDANT'S ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. EVIDENCE ON THOSE DEFENSES RELEVANT TO DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR # 13358 301/PHA
